channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti Camberwell Church Street. Vape shop number 76., 3rd May
item.description:
Weekend

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 76, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of Tree Branches, 3rd May
item.description:
Branches left piled high, now people are dumping black bags and other items around it. This is a health snd safety and fire issue.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tenants/property owner has left old building waste and pallets at rear on foot path, 3rd May
item.description:
Tenants/property owner has left old building waste and pallets at rear on foot path. Been there over 2 weeks,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gardeners Close, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked footpaths, 3rd May
item.description:
No need for this - space in front gardens. Please get landlords and households to take them in. Bad for parents with buggies and disabled people who all need help. Take action! !

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Spurling Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plastic frames flytipped, 3rd May
item.description:
Did report this before the report stated fixed but frames are still there

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shottery Close, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Households bags left overnight, 3rd May
item.description:
Households bags left overnight

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Meeting House Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cricklewood Broadway near richborough road full of rubbish!, 3rd May
item.description:
Very poor service, why no one thought to put more bins. The street and pavements full of rubbish in decomposition. Looks like being in a third world country. Keep the street clean

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cricklewood Broadway, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge amount of fly tipped rubbish and furniture, 3rd May
item.description:
Being spread along Ankerdine by foxes and vermin. Huge fly tip!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ankerdine Crescent, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive Graffiti all along alley way wall, need the be completely repainted, 3rd May
item.description:
Offensive Graffiti all along alley way wall, need the be completely repainted

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Cray Avenue, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Larger sticker on traffic site controller door, engineer requesting borough to follow up and investigate / remove, 3rd May
item.description:
Larger sticker on traffic site controller door, engineer requesting borough to follow up and investigate / remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Gate, Brompton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden Palettes and loose clothing and geberal waste, 3rd May
item.description:
As above. Larfe wooden palettes, loose clothing and general waste.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sumner Avenue, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Dumped black bags and other items, 3rd May
item.description:
Dumped black bags and loose items.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Moody Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting at Sacred Heart School bus stop, 3rd May
item.description:
Flyposting on the advertising panel and flagpole at the Sacred Heart School bus stop (N136) on Camberwell New Rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell New Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Cars parked in electric charging bays, 3rd May
item.description:
Non electric cars parking here and they are not charging either
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rufford Street, Barnsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic light facing wrong direction, 3rd May
item.description:
Bus priority traffic light is facing the wrong direction here - has been bashed by traffic.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell New Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Foliage overgrowth covering both ESP and Controller: see photos: Request Borough to follow up and trim, 3rd May
item.description:
Foliage overgrowth covering both ESP and Controller: see photos: Request Borough to follow up and trim
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 171, Fulham Road, Brompton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Controller & ESP is covered behind with tree branches heavily, 3rd May
item.description:
Controller & ESP is covered behind with tree branches heavily just able to get the door open. Was not able to check the ESP due to being fully covered under tree branches. This needs to be raised & cut back the foliage.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and Other Rubbish outside Park, 2nd May
item.description:
Mattress been bumped outside park for days! Now has Cardboard boxes, black bags, Tree Branches snd other rubbish. This is a major concert snd is a fire hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mayfield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars parking on bus stand, 2nd May
item.description:
I am bus driver and facing everyday evenings cars parking on the bus stand in which endanger our passengers whom have to be leaving the bus unsafe and prams lifted from high bus down to the road then crossing to the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Hall Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive ants in Ardeley Court, 2nd May
item.description:
Lots of ants in Ardeley Court surrounding what look like a liquid spillage. Causing health and safety hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brownswood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
